name: Analogical Reasoning Circuit - 180 Features
description: All 180 features with >=5 total node instances across 5 analogy attribution graphs. Gemma-2-2B, gemmascope-transcoder-16k SAE. Prompts: Berlin/Rome/Tokyo capital analogies + teacher/bird semantic-role analogies. Counting method: total node instances (a feature firing at N token positions = N appearances).
